injuries.comment: Edstrom did not play on Thursday's (Dec. 4) game against Ottawa.
The Rangers said on Tuesday (Dec. 2) that Quick isn't quite ready to return to the lineup yet, per Vince Z. Mercogliano of The Athletic.
The Avalanche announced on Wednesday (Dec. 3) that Brindley will join the Avalanche on their upcoming four-game road trip and might play before the end of it, per Evan Rawal of the Denver Gazette.
Wedgewood did not play in Thursday's (Dec. 4) game versus the Islanders.
